hypothesis: A spin-state and d-electron-aware multi-fidelity ∆-learning model that introduces an intermediate DFT+U level between GFN1-xTB and high-fidelity DFT data will reduce the mean absolute error in HSE06-band-gap predictions for MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni) by at least 0.2 eV compared to the current two-level ∆-learning approach.
